comments.comment: Consider adding a short summary or objective statement at the beginning to clarify the purpose of the Silent Planning Protocol.
This phase description could be more actionable. Consider breaking down the exact methods or indicators used to recognize intent.
Cognitive staging could benefit from a concrete example to illustrate how it's applied in practice.
